subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the Tablet from the heaven of Our Will, and verily it is a manifest Book, revealed in truth from God, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا اللوح من سماء مشیتی و انه لکتاب مبین نزل بالحق من لدی الله العلیم الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
